title: Craftable Upgrades
description: Simply adds a crafting recipe for the Netherite upgrade.
body:
Extremely simple.

In case you can't see the image or the alternative text, the recipe is a diamond surrounded by netherrack.

![One Diamond Surrounded By Netherrack](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/PDI83cr5/images/8e856035db6a57663dbc1fbf5f224eb00082d69f.png)
